allow: Bash(sbcl --non-interactive --eval '\(handler-bind \(\(error \(lambda \(e\) \(format t "~%>>> ERROR: ~A~%>>> TYPE: ~S~%" e \(type-of e\)\)\)\)\) \(ql:quickload "mcclim"\)\)' --eval '\(sb-ext:exit\)')

Bash(sbcl --non-interactive --eval '\(format t "before: ql=~A ul=~A~%" \(ql-dist:preference \(ql-dist:dist "quicklisp"\)\) \(ql-dist:preference \(ql-dist:dist "ultralisp"\)\)\)' --eval '\(setf \(ql-dist:preference \(ql-dist:dist "ultralisp"\)\) -100\)' --eval '\(format t "after:  ql=~A ul=~A~%" \(ql-dist:preference \(ql-dist:dist "quicklisp"\)\) \(ql-dist:preference \(ql-dist:dist "ultralisp"\)\)\)' --eval '\(handler-case \(progn \(ql:quickload "mcclim" :silent t\) \(format t "MCCLIM-OK~%"\)\) \(error \(e\) \(format t "FAIL: ~A~%" e\)\)\)' --eval '\(sb-ext:exit\)')

Bash(sbcl --non-interactive --eval '\(dolist \(d \(list "quicklisp" "ultralisp"\)\) \(let \(\(r \(ql-dist:find-system-in-dist "cl-unicode" \(ql-dist:dist d\)\)\)\) \(format t "~A: ~A~%" d \(and r \(ql-dist:release r\)\)\)\)\)' --eval '\(let \(\(r \(ql-dist:installed-release-system "cl-unicode"\)\)\) \(format t "INSTALLED: ~A~%" r\)\)' --eval '\(sb-ext:exit\)')

Bash(sbcl --non-interactive --eval '\(let \(\(rel \(find "edicl-cl-unicode-20231126182100" \(ql-dist:installed-releases \(ql-dist:dist "ultralisp"\)\) :key \(function ql-dist:name\) :test \(function string=\)\)\)\) \(when rel \(ql-dist:uninstall rel\) \(format t "UNINSTALLED ~A~%" rel\)\)\)' --eval '\(sb-ext:exit\)')

Bash(sbcl --non-interactive --eval '\(format t "~%installed unicode releases:~%"\)' --eval '\(dolist \(d \(ql-dist:enabled-dists\)\) \(dolist \(r \(ql-dist:installed-releases d\)\) \(when \(search "unicode" \(ql-dist:name r\)\) \(format t "  ~A \(dist ~A\)~%" \(ql-dist:name r\) \(ql-dist:name d\)\)\)\)\)' --eval '\(dolist \(d \(ql-dist:enabled-dists\)\) \(dolist \(r \(ql-dist:installed-releases d\)\) \(when \(search "unicode" \(ql-dist:name r\)\) \(ql-dist:uninstall r\) \(format t "  -> uninstalled ~A~%" \(ql-dist:name r\)\)\)\)\)' --eval '\(sb-ext:exit\)')

Bash(sbcl --non-interactive --eval '\(setf \(ql-dist:preference \(ql-dist:dist "ultralisp"\)\) -100\)' --eval '\(format t "ul preference now: ~A~%" \(ql-dist:preference \(ql-dist:dist "ultralisp"\)\)\)' --eval '\(handler-case \(progn \(ql:quickload "mcclim" :silent t\) \(format t "~%>>> MCCLIM-LOADED-OK~%"\)\) \(error \(e\) \(format t "~%>>> FAIL: ~A~%" e\)\)\)' --eval '\(let \(\(r \(ql-dist:find-system "cl-unicode"\)\)\) \(format t ">>> cl-unicode resolves to: ~A~%" \(ql-dist:release r\)\)\)' --eval '\(sb-ext:exit\)')

Bash(sbcl --non-interactive --eval '\(ql:quickload "cl-ppcre" :silent t\)' --eval '\(format t "~%ppcre release: ~A~%" \(ql-dist:release \(ql-dist:find-system "cl-ppcre"\)\)\)' --eval '\(dolist \(s \(list "*STANDARD-OPTIMIZE-SETTINGS*" "WITH-REBINDING"\)\) \(multiple-value-bind \(sym status\) \(find-symbol s :cl-ppcre\) \(format t "  ~A -> ~A / ~A~%" s sym status\)\)\)' --eval '\(sb-ext:exit\)')

Bash(timeout 540 sbcl --non-interactive --eval '\(ql:quickload "cl-ppcre" :silent t\)' --eval '\(unless \(find-symbol "*STANDARD-OPTIMIZE-SETTINGS*" :cl-ppcre\) \(let \(\(s \(intern "*STANDARD-OPTIMIZE-SETTINGS*" :cl-ppcre\)\)\) \(proclaim \(list \(quote special\) s\)\) \(set s \(quote \(optimize speed \(safety 0\) \(space 0\) \(debug 1\) \(compilation-speed 0\)\)\)\) \(export s :cl-ppcre\) \(format t ">>> shim: interned ~S~%" s\)\)\)' --eval '\(handler-case \(progn \(ql:quickload "mcclim" :silent t\) \(format t "~%>>> MCCLIM-LOADED-OK~%"\)\) \(error \(e\) \(format t "~%>>> FAIL: ~A~%" e\)\)\)' --eval '\(sb-ext:exit\)')

Bash(timeout 540 sbcl --non-interactive --load load-clim.lisp --eval '\(format t "~%>>> frame class present: ~A~%" \(and \(find-class \(read-from-string "plc-sim-clim::ladder-frame"\) nil\) t\)\)' --eval '\(format t ">>> run fbound: ~A~%" \(fboundp \(read-from-string "plc-sim-clim:run"\)\)\)' --eval '\(sb-ext:exit\)')
